name: shinden-to-anilist
description: Desktop tool for exporting Shinden lists into AniList-compatible data.
author: Kacper Kondracki

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:45187 && SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_ELECTRON_DEV=1 SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 SHINDEN_TO_ANILIST_GRPC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:45187 pnpm --filter electron dev
scripts.bundle:linux:system: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:linux && pnpm build:icons && node scripts/package-system-electron.mjs --format=tar
scripts.bundle:linux:bundled: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:linux && pnpm build:icons && node scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs linux && pnpm --filter electron exec electron-builder --linux dir
scripts.bundle:linux:appimage:system: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:linux && pnpm build:icons && node scripts/package-system-electron.mjs --format=appimage
scripts.bundle:linux:appimage:bundled: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:linux && pnpm build:icons && node scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs linux && pnpm --filter electron exec electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.bundle:windows:portable: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:windows && pnpm build:icons && node scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs windows && pnpm --filter electron exec electron-builder --win portable
scripts.bundle:windows:portable:xwin: pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:electron && pnpm build:grpc:windows:xwin && pnpm build:icons && node scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs windows && pnpm --filter electron exec electron-builder --win portable
scripts.export:linux: pnpm bundle:linux:system && pnpm bundle:linux:appimage:system && pnpm bundle:linux:bundled && pnpm bundle:linux:appimage:bundled
scripts.format: pnpm format:crates && pnpm format:frontend && pnpm format:electron
